docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLICKSBERG, JONATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAVO, MAXWELL $369.26 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $504.26 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2014 - JUDGMENT.

TRIAL RESET TO OCT-01-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-04-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BRAVO, MAXWELL HEARING SET FOR DEC-04-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MAXWELL BRAVO IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLICKSBERG, JONATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAVO, MAXWELL $276.81 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $411.81, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MAXWELL BRAVO SET FOR DEC-04-2014 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-22-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN 506. "CONTINED MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. JUDGE HAS ASKED THE DEFENDANT TO MAIL A COPY OF THE MOTION TO VACATE TO THE COURT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
